title: Software Architecture — Large-Scale Systems
subject: system-design
source: Personal study notes paraphrased from Michael Pogrebinsky's 'Software Architecture & Design of Large-Scale Systems' (Udemy, §1–4, own copy). Not affiliated; for personal revision only.
summary: What architecture really is, the quality attributes and constraints that drive it, how to measure performance/availability at the tail, and how to design REST vs RPC APIs that last.
